task_completion.description: Create a new page titled 'Summer Explorer Campaign'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the WordPress page editor or the Pages list showing a page with the exact title 'Summer Explorer Campaign'.

task_completion.description: Add a Cover block using the 'hero_mountain.jpg' image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Cover block in the WordPress editor or frontend displaying a mountain photograph.

task_completion.description: Add the text 'Explore the Wild' to the Cover block.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact text 'Explore the Wild' overlaid on the mountain image within the Cover block.

task_completion.description: Add a Query Loop block below the Cover block.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Query Loop block in the editor (or a grid/list of posts on the frontend) positioned after the Cover block.

task_completion.description: Filter the Query Loop block to the 'Travel' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Query Loop block settings panel showing a filter applied for the 'Travel' category, or the frontend displaying posts that specifically belong to the Travel category.

task_completion.description: Publish the page and set it as the site's static homepage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the WordPress Reading Settings page with 'Your homepage displays' set to 'A static page' and 'Homepage' set to 'Summer Explorer Campaign', or the site's root URL displaying the newly created page.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser to interact with the WordPress GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser open to the WordPress admin dashboard or frontend, rather than terminal commands executing SQL or WP-CLI scripts to build the page.

integrity.description: The agent uploaded the actual image file rather than using a placeholder or external hotlink.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the WordPress Media Library upload interface, file selection dialog, or the actual mountain image successfully rendered in the editor.

integrity.description: The agent created a real WordPress page rather than a mock-up.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown must be the WordPress block editor (Gutenberg) or the live WordPress site frontend, not a local HTML file open in a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The page title must be exactly 'Summer Explorer Campaign'. The hero text on the Cover block must be exactly 'Explore the Wild'. The image used in the Cover block must be 'hero_mountain.jpg' (a photograph of a mountain). The Query Loop block must be explicitly filtered to the 'Travel' category.
